Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}The ramen here is sooo good... And something in it makes your skin nice and smooth too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I'll come have some after we're done with Sanada-san.[n]{f 1 1}
